methods.name: create_tbill_asas_short
methods.desc: Create short-term T-bill ASAs: 1D, 3D, 7D, 14D. Call once after deploy.

methods.name: create_tbill_asas_long
methods.desc: Create medium/long-term T-bill ASAs: 30D, 60D, 90D. Call after create_tbill_asas_short.

methods.name: invest
methods.desc:
Accept ALGO payment, record T-bill position with maturity timestamp.
tbill_type must be one of: 1, 3, 7, 14, 30, 60, 90.

methods.name: redeem
methods.desc:
Redeem a matured T-bill position.
Returns principal + yield in ALGO to the orchestrator.

methods.name: fund_reserve
methods.desc: Add ALGO to the yield reserve.

methods.name: set_demo_mode
methods.desc: Toggle demo mode. multiplier = seconds per 'day' (60 = 1 day = 1 min).
